title: Circuit Digitization: a deterministic hand-drawn-schematic-to-SPICE pipeline with an endpoint-graph wire join and a human-verified connectivity benchmark
description: Deterministic pipeline that converts scanned hand-drawn circuit schematics into SPICE netlists via component detection, an occlusion-first wire extractor, and a graph-based endpoint join with degree-budget completion. Ships the first human-verified net-level connectivity benchmark for hand-drawn circuits (31 images from CGHD-1152), the synthetic-circuit generator, the join-strategy and baseline benchmarks, and the VLM connectivity harness. Source code and our own annotations (net connectivity, wire polylines) are released under MIT; material derived from CGHD-1152 (overlay images under ground_truth/net_gt_ui_overlays/ and component annotations under ground_truth/component_labels/) remains under CC BY 4.0. See LICENSE.txt and ground_truth/LICENSE.
